title: Real-Time Speaker Recognition
subtitle: ECE420 Final Project — Completed May 2025
subheader: This project is a real-time speaker identification Android application that recognizes which enrolled speaker is currently talking using live microphone input, completed as a final project for ECE420. The app runs entirely on-device, offering immediate visual and confidence feedback without requiring server-side inference.

content.caption: Technical diagram and flow of data across the project.
